testcase.name: proposal_approval
testcase.failure: { "file": "/mnt/data/heartbeat-demo-documentation/approvals/proposal.json", "valid": false, "gate": "proposal", "status": "PENDING", "approver_name": null, "approver_role": "Business Owner / Technology Lead", "approved_at": null, "expires_at": null, "unverified_evidence": [ "Business objective is clear", "Scope is limited to Shipment Validation API", "Requirements BR-001 through BR-006 are reviewed", "Acceptance criteria AC-001 through AC-004 are reviewed", "Risks and dependencies are documented", "No second demo use case is introduced" ], "errors": [ "Gate is not approved: PENDING.", "Approver name is missing.", "approved_at is missing or invalid ISO-8601.", "6 required evidence item(s) are not verified." ] }
testcase.system-out: { "file": "/mnt/data/heartbeat-demo-documentation/approvals/proposal.json", "valid": false, "gate": "proposal", "status": "PENDING", "approver_name": null, "approver_role": "Business Owner / Technology Lead", "approved_at": null, "expires_at": null, "unverified_evidence": [ "Business objective is clear", "Scope is limited to Shipment Validation API", "Requirements BR-001 through BR-006 are reviewed", "Acceptance criteria AC-001 through AC-004 are reviewed", "Risks and dependencies are documented", "No second demo use case is introduced" ], "errors": [ "Gate is not approved: PENDING.", "Approver name is missing.", "approved_at is missing or invalid ISO-8601.", "6 required evidence item(s) are not verified." ] }
